evals.name: view-week
evals.prompt: Check my Tempo timesheet for this week and tell me how many hours I've logged each day.
evals.expected_output: A readable breakdown of worklogs grouped by day with per-day and week totals, fetched via the Tempo API.

evals.name: create-and-cleanup
evals.prompt: Log 30m on OSHIETE-5801 for today with description 'eval test'. After confirming it was created, delete that worklog to clean up. Show me the before and after.
evals.expected_output: Creates a worklog (resolving OSHIETE-5801 to numeric issue ID via Jira MCP), confirms creation, then deletes it. Shows today's worklogs before and after.

evals.name: view-specific-day
evals.prompt: What did I log yesterday on Tempo? Give me the breakdown.
evals.expected_output: Fetches yesterday's worklogs via Tempo API and presents them with hours, issue IDs, and descriptions.
